model: Meta Prophet (additive trend + multiplicative yearly + country holidays + COVID 2020-21 events + GDP/capita regressor where available)
note: Short-term forecasts. Fit nightly by .github/workflows/refresh-data.yml on the real observed series. Per-airport output lives in data/forecasts/<IATA>.json, fetched by the browser once that gateway is selected; this file only carries the shared model metadata.
